libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment variables or system properties. If tests choose to exercise full MavenCli build execution rather than simple in-process/help/version paths, keep that isolated with temporary directories and avoid relying on the host ~/.m2, settings.xml, or network access.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Maven 2.0.7 is very old and some public/internal APIs differ from 2.0.6; generated tests must use the 2.0.7 constructor signatures.
Full Maven build execution can read local settings/repositories or attempt artifact resolution, so such integration-style tests may be flaky unless isolated in test code.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed. org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its required Maven, Plexus, Wagon, and ClassWorlds dependencies transitively; meaningful coverage is reachable with in-process APIs such as diagnostics, runtime information, lifecycle/plugin classes, and MavenCli help/version paths. The observed javac failure is due to Maven 2.0.7 constructor signature drift in maven-artifact exceptions, not a missing dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property.
